title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness: Future Pathways and Cross-Fertilizations through Cultural Psycholog

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Mindfulness: Future Pathways and Cross-Fertilizations through Cultural Psychology.** — Integr Psychol Behav Sci. PMID: 39708060. DOI: 10.1007/s12124-024-09884-2. This commentary outlines anovel agenda for future mindfulness research, building on various authors' insights, particularly Indius. Meditation and Self-transcendence: A Human need? Integrative Psychological and Behavioral Science, 58(3), 878-883), who integrates Maslow'shierarchy of needs into the discussion of mindfulness. Indius argues for arevision of humanistic psychology to reflect contemporary needs, emphasizing the dynamic nature of meditation as atransformative pro
